name: Chestnuts with Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat margarine in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onion and mushrooms; sauté until browned, stirring occasionally.
3. Sprinkle flour over the vegetables and stir to combine.
4. Gradually add stock while continuously stirring to prevent lumps.
5. Add the boiled chestnuts once the sauce has thickened slightly.
6. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
7. Pour in white wine and bring the mixture to a boil, stirring occasionally.
8. Serve hot over cooked rice.
